◆ copyFunctionProto()

Function * copyFunctionProto ( TypeMapTy & TypeMap,
Module & DstM,
const Function * SF )
static

Link the function in the source module into the destination module if needed, setting up mapping information.

void copyGVAttributes ( GlobalValue * DestGV,

copy additional attributes (those not needed to construct a GlobalValue) from the SrcGV to the DestGV.

◆ forceRenaming()

void forceRenaming ( GlobalValue * GV,
StringRef Name )
static

The LLVM SymbolTable class autorenames globals that conflict in the symbol table. This is good for all clients except for us. Go through the trouble to force this back.

Definition at line 508 of file LinkModules.cpp.

References llvm::Value::getName(), llvm::Module::getNamedValue(), llvm::GlobalValue::getParent(), llvm::GlobalValue::hasLocalLinkage(), Name, llvm::Value::setName(), and llvm::Value::takeName().

Referenced by copyGVAttributes().
